hotel_name: Sheraton Resort & Spa, Tokoriki Island, Fiji

reviews.title: Amazing stay at Sheraton Tokoriki Island! Paradise
reviews.text: We spent 5 amazing days at Sheraton Tokoriki! The hotel is very well located on a breathtaking white-sand & turquoise water beach. The food was very nice too those a bit expensive. But the quality was here. Staff is friendly and Rooms are very comfortable . Highly recommended if you wish to have a paradise beach holiday.
reviews.positives: Breathtaking beach, Great hotel and Friendly staff

reviews.title: Save your money!
reviews.text:
My adult daughter and I lasted 2 days. Had a Beach front villa, doesn’t have direct access to beach. Every water sports activity has to be paid for. The food is very ordinary, breakfast consisted of juice from a can and fruit also from a can. I’d seen reviews saying how expensive the food and drinks are, so to a certain extent I thought I was prepared. Wrong!!! It is outrageously expensive, and very average. I can see no value to this resort. 
The rooms are not that clean, with constant calls to replace towels etc.

reviews.title: Terrible treatment by staff and not worth its price!
reviews.text: What could have been the highlight of our trip was ruined by poor management and a rude hotel manager. Upon check-in at 2 p.m., Subha, a receptionist, offered to split our beds for our group of three. However, when we entered our room, we found a broken air conditioner stuck at 19ºC. The phone in the room wasn’t working, so we had to walk to reception. Subha apologised and asked us to wait in the restaurant while it was fixed. We returned to the room an hour later, but nothing had changed—the beds were still unsplit, and the air conditioner was still broken. We walked to reception again; they apologised and assured us someone would arrive soon. After another 15 minutes, a maintenance man informed us that we would need to change rooms because the problem was unfixable. He said it would take 15 minutes, but after waiting another half hour, no one came to change our room. By 5 p.m., we walked to reception again. We were tired of false promises. We requested to meet the manager to ask for a refund. In an attempt to quell our anger, Subha offered a 150 FJD credit for dinner and ensured the room would be ready in 15 minutes. After 15 minutes, he guided us to the new room, only to find that housekeeping had just begun to put the bedsheets on. The room was finally ready at 6 p.m., but both the phone and the safe were still broken. We were furious. Subha apologised again and said the hotel manager would meet us the next day. However, this meeting turned out to be the worst part of our stay. The manager, Lawrence Bolton, introduced himself. My mother began recounting our experience to him, but after two minutes, he started interjecting and speaking over her. He apologised for our experience, saying he was ‘new’ and would pass our feedback on to the team. He also mentioned that we were already compensated for as a 150 FJD credit was ‘a lot for a broken air conditioner’. He remarked that we stayed only one night, apologised that it happened to be on a rainy day, and said he could not control the weather—which we had NEVER complained about. He seemed uninterested in explaining anything and looked down on us for staying only one night. I was infuriated, but as I began to speak, he said he had “heard enough,” thanked us, and then left. What a terrible, condescending attitude! We had been incredibly patient, but after meeting Lawrence, enough was enough. We requested a refund through Agoda, but the hotel refused, claiming they had compensated us with 174 FJD and 3 breakfasts, which is a lie. It is so disappointing I must resort to a negative review for something to be done. For an award-winning hotel, we feel cheated out of our time, money, and respect. Especially since it costs 370 FJD per person just to take a ferry to the resort! This was the worst customer experience I’ve ever had. Honestly, there is nothing special or grand about this resort to justify these costs. I absolutely do not recommend coming here.

reviews.title: Did not meet our expectations
reviews.text: Room was underwhelming for the price paid. Food was expensive and below average. There was not a lot of options especially after a 5 night stay.

reviews.title: Horrible experience
reviews.text:
Stayed her from 27/01/2024 - 1/02/2024. 

Staff were super friendly and that was about it. 

Service was slow, food was terrible. 6 weeks later after our holiday we are noticing money being deducted from our account without any prior notice or consent.

reviews.title: Great location. Pleasant but completely inattentive waiters. Below average food offerings and servic
reviews.positives: Fabulous location. We were upgraded to a beach front room which was great. It was quiet and clean.
reviews.negatives:
The food and restaurant were awful. The waiters are pleasant but completely inattentive. At no time did any staff member attend the table when we sat down for breakfast or lunch. We had to go and find someone every time.

The food at breakfast was awful. Pots of food had clearly been cooked the night before or very early and were cold e.g. on the second day, I ended up half eating cold baked beans and mushrooms on toast for breakfast. 

When ordering lunch time meals, the fries were always cold. More often than not, food would arrive at entirely different times. 

It's as though the restaurant staff have never been trained in hospitality.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Facilities in dire need of an upgrade, staff great.

reviews.title: Family hotel not for couples
reviews.positives: The staff
reviews.negatives: Ocean view room was in a bure with 3 other unit. You could hear kids cry in the night. Food

reviews.title: not worth the money
reviews.text:
We did stay 6 nights in this place and were quite dissappointed about the facilities and their condidtion. The staff is quite nice and try hard but cannot reach a five star standard. The island is relatively remote which is nice but brings also some challenges for the operations which they cannot always manage well. The condidtion of the kids club is unaceptable bad. We decided not to put our kids in there. Furthermore the size of the swimming pool is too small. 
Whoever has experienced a 5 star hotel/resort that is up to the standard will be strongly disappointed travelling to this one.

reviews.title: Whack asf here
reviews.positives: Cloud 9
reviews.negatives: Stuck there. Bad service. Under staffed. Over priced asf

reviews.title: Very expensive. No order in resort. Very long wait times for food
reviews.text: Great nanny services

reviews.title: Disappointing and not great value for money.
reviews.positives: Nice beach and the dining facilities / layout were oustanding. Loved the pool volleyball each day at 3pm.
reviews.negatives:
The first room we were allocated hadn't been cleaned but they did leave us a vacuum cleaner and cleaning products in the room. The toilet hadn't been flushed and a hatch into the room was broken and hanging down. To their credit they did move us without us having to ask.

One of the staff in particular was very rude to my partner and I. The food was pretty average but comparable when compared to other places I have stayed in Fiji. Of the four resorts I have stayed at in Fiji this one ranks down the bottom.

reviews.title: Misleading & overpriced
reviews.text: The hotel is in my opinion not to  global Sheraton standard. The swimming pool was full of murky water and our “Ocean view” room had not view of the ocean. The lady at reception literally said: “Let me explain to you what ocean view means”. Apparently, ocean front and ocean view are two seperate categories. The Indian restaurant on the grounds has a very limited menu (4 appetisers, 4 mains), offers very small portions and is not worth the money. My partner and I were both still hungry after dinner there. The Fijian buffet in the Waitui restaurant offered cafeteria style a la carte offering and overpriced buffet - not worth the money. Staff are friendly but not that proactive. The Tokoriki island is spectacular and offers superb snorkelling, but the hotel water sports team have limited “free” snorkling gear and prioritise customers who book the FJD $ 185 three-hour snorkling trip. Overall, I am not sure it is worth paying FJD$ 378 for ferry just to get to the island. You would be better placed at somewhere else, like, Sofitel Denarau - which is priced similarly but offers much, much more.

reviews.title: Amazing water
reviews.text: I love this place but sheraton has worked to do with the facilities

reviews.title: 7 nights Dec 2024
reviews.text: Amazing location, near castaway movie island, facilities ok, very limited food options, food not best quality, staff ok, overpriced food and drinks, limited day tour options (nearby snorkeling only)

reviews.title: OVERpriced ood and inconsistent service
reviews.text:
Pros
- lovely clean beach 
- great varied activities program 
- watersports and their staff
- reception staff 
- nice pool area 
- shower 


Cons
- $90 for a tiny steak, a spoon of mash and 2 broccoli stems 
- $45 for re-heated curry that arrived cold the first time and then warm the second time. The restaurant staff dealt with this poorly! Reception staff addressed the issue and refunded the meal. 
- breakfast buffet ran out of pain au chocolat

reviews.title: Nice resort for Sheraton brand. Lacks decent beach though, so you probably spend your time around pool mostly.
reviews.text: On the site staff is very nice as well as everywhere in Fiji but everything related to correspondence is totally terrible. Unless it is related to charging money. Be prepared they might not reply to your e-mail or will not call you back.

reviews.title: Family Holiday
reviews.text: We (Mum, 5yo Sister & Me) visited Tokoriki Sheraton Resort & Spa for a end of year holiday over the Christmas and New Year break, we spent 10 days in total on the Island. We stayed in the Garden Bure, approximately 50m from the beach front. The rooms were satisfactory, bathroom a decent size with all of the necessities, shower water pressure was satisfactory. Air conditioning in the rooms was good, which was a life saver on those hot island days. The room could of been better cleaned, and the bed wasn't the most comfortable. Moving onto food, the island has 2x restaurants in the Sheraton resort and 1 other in neighbouring Adults only Tokoriki Resort. The food was VERY dear. I would recommend bringing a fair amount of food with you on the trip, and storing in the small bar fridge available in the room. It is very expensive, and the portions aren't generous. Aside from that, the Island location was gorgeous, 10days was a bit too long of a stay. Would recommend 7 days.

reviews.title: They didn’t take my food allergy seriously and now I am sick.
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: No outside option for dining.

reviews.title: A little disappointed
reviews.text:
This was our 1st time to this resort  but we've been to Fiji many times. This was my 1st time ever being spoken rudely to by a staff member. I had left our 2 umbrellas in a basket at the activities desk whilst we went to breakfast and when I went to retrieve them I was told they weren't mine to take, they were another guests (  I had even requested the basket to leave them in so we didn't drip them over the tiles).  There was no way he was allowing me to take them, another staff member produced 1 out of a cupboard.
Breakfast was nice and barrista coffee was included in the complimentary breakfast.  Snorkelling wasn't great off the beach. Unfortunately we won't be returning to this island resort.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: More family vibe, location is great but transfer could be tricky, food and cocktails was disappointing by the place it is and the price paid. However if you want to drink and eat well, the resort adults only beside it is excellent and has great vibe, it's also expensive, but worth the money for what they offer.

reviews.title: A nice place
reviews.text: We were at this resort in the second week of January and went with a group of family and friends. There really was nothing wrong with this place. It clean and relaxing and typical of an island in Fiji. The only issue all of us had was the price of the food. The buffet dinner was $98 Fijian and al-a-cart meals started from around $58. They should really think about a food package. The food was great though and catered for my allergies. We all had a good time.
reviews.positives: The 3 best things about this placce was location as the sunset is beautiful, how well kept the place was and not being a crowded place which made it more relaxed.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Was a pleasant stay but very expensive!

reviews.title: Break from the Lions Tour
reviews.text: Not bad

reviews.title: Nice resort
reviews.text: The staff were very nice, especially some of them like Emma, the kitchen manager who paid attention to the fact that we are vegan and made vegan pancakes for us every morning. The vegan lunch/dinner option were below average though, they contained no protein - this is an area that needs improvement.

reviews.title: Wonderful time in paradise
reviews.text: I would highly recommend the Sheraton Resort and Spa, Tokoriki. The staff were so warm and friendly and the service was excellent. It is a real paradise and I will come back again and again and again!

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Just don't order food from Salabar Menu. Chicken nuggets oily inside, Fry's not crispy, the worst club sandwich in the world. It was soggy and wet. Complain the first time and the second time was the same. The hamburger was just okay very dense meat not much flavor.

reviews.title: Great service !
reviews.text: I love the people working in this resort, they are so friendly, sincere and happy. We met the manager on the ferry cruise to the resort and each time we meet him at the resort, he is always offering good advice on what to do on the island and making sure that everything is great. The only concern is the price of the food at the main restaurant, it is very high. But I must say that the food was really good, I tried their battered fish that comes with rice, and the brown sauce was out of this world.

reviews.title: Beautiful property, amazing staff
reviews.text:
would highly recommend to couples and families with kids. Great staff!! We would definitely come back!
The food is a bit too pricey compared to other resorts, but it was delicious and worth the money.

reviews.title: Best Experience
reviews.text: The staff were very friendly, lovely beautiful location with white sandy beaches. This resort had exceptional food quality and overall a great experience.
reviews.room_type: Plunge Pool, Larger Guest room, 1 King, Island view, Adults Only

reviews.title: 5 days of islands
reviews.text: We spent 5 days the staff made our trip they looked after us.  The room was great the resort gardens are tired could do with more gardening

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives: Beach was not clean. Swimming pool needs more cleaning. Food options are not good. Staff are slow. Major fly problem.

reviews.title: Superb resort and destination. Highly recommend.
reviews.text: Loved everything about this resort - especially the laid back atmosphere, the (mostly) friendly staff, the pool, the views, the beach, the Indian restaurant, the rooms, the snorkelling, the swim up bar, the activities, and especially the sunsets.  One of the nicest places that I have stayed (and I have travelled to a lot of resorts!).  Perfect for 4 nights (maybe not longer as the food options aren't extensive).

reviews.title: I would not consider this a 5 star resort
reviews.positives:
The staff
The breakfast buffet 
The bed/ room
The grounds
reviews.negatives:
No internet or Wi-Fi in room 228.
No Club Soda.
I had gastric upset after eating at the Indian restaurant.

reviews.title: Very relaxing resort!
reviews.text: This is the perfect place to go if you need time away from all the stress to just relax! The staff at the kids club are amazing! We will be back for sure!

reviews.title: Tokoriki Island
reviews.text:
Excellent location.
Limited food options, food quality does not match the price. Breakfast was great however, omelettes were the best.
Reasonable priced tours from island.
Best for laying around drinking cocktails.
Excellent staff. Wise for cocktails, Dean for coffee and Iva for breakfast, vinkava to you all it made for a great time.

reviews.title: Heaven on Earth
reviews.text:
Fiji is and specially the island was amazing. not crowded beautiful water and water sport facilities.
Good breakfast and dinner.
And best part of FIJI is the People they are always clam and happy and helpful.

AS they say you are in FIJI Time "No hurry No worry" Bula :) and will love stay in Sheraton Hotel in Future and definitely coming back to Sheraton Fiji.

Special thanks to staff to make our stay comfortable.

Cheers
Naveen

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Fabulous 5 days of relaxing in the sun. Loved the location and snorkeling at the reef.  Beautiful buffet breakfast with friendly staff on hand. Great first experience of Fiji

reviews.title: A piece of paradise
reviews.text: The Sheraton resort tokoriki is a wonderful place.  It is truly a gem. I have been twice and I will return again soon. Great caring staff, food and the rooms are comfortable and  clean. I hope you are able to make it for a visit as it is a very beautiful and special place. 💖

reviews.title: Stunningly beautiful island - superb 3 night stay
reviews.text:
We visited the Sheraton Tokoriki as a family of 10 and it didn't disappoint. For some of our family it was their first ever resort holiday overseas, and for some of us it was a return to Fiji and as seasoned 'overseas resorters'. All of us absolutely loved it (ages 65, 62, 39, 37, 24, 24, 16, 13, 7, 2). Tokoriki is one of the most (if not the most) beautiful island I have stayed. 
We stayed in an ocean front room - idyllic/paradise, large, excellent aircon, beautiful bathroom, sunbeds . The family had 3 rooms in a group with ocean views (limited views) but the rooms were large and very comfortable.
The pool with swim up bar is smallish but perfectly adequate and never felt crowded. Swim up bar. Plenty of beds. Staff endlessly helpful and happy.  Fun activities. It's a small resort and feels very 'homey'. The staff who sang just before we left were amazing - harmonies spot on.
Snorkelling at the reef about 200-300m out pretty good - saw lots of different fish, a shark, a sea snake and the coral quite healthy.  Rides back to shore on the jet ski.
Perfect sunsets. Views of other islands.
Honestly, I can hardly fault the resort. 
Only mild negatives includes the range of food (limited menus but tasty) after reading other reviews we were expecting the worst but the food was fine - especially the Indian restaurant, all of our group loved the curries.  We felt that if we'd stayed another night we'd have found it difficult to know what to choose from the menus. Only negative my husband would like me to mention is that the pool table needs resurfacing (ripped and torn) and the cues are broken. 
Can't understand the negative reviews - I have stayed on the mainland , Mana, Matamanoa (and resorts in numerous other countries) and this one was one of my top 3!! Highly recommend for a 3-night stay.

reviews.title: fantastic spot
reviews.text: Lovely resort with fantastic staff who can't do enough for you. Very friendly and welcoming. This resort caters for families of all ages, as well as Solo travelers and Couples.

reviews.title: Great place
reviews.text: Very easy vegetarian food options and indian food is not that much authentic.

reviews.title: Superb
reviews.text: Staff were amazing. Great room and pool and bar areas. Not cheap.

reviews.title: Good place to relax and go for snorkeling
reviews.text: A decent resort with beautiful sea views and spacious and modern hotel room/bathroom. Well organised resort facilities and very easy access to Monuriki island, where the film Cast Away was filmed on. We met some good people too on the resort, Shujoy and Sina ( a beautiful lady, a mix of Fiji and Rotuma) from the reception, Sam at Water Sports, Dean at the WAITUI House, they are very friendly and professional, thank you all! Your smile are the sunshine of this resort, you are the treasure of Sheraton. You guys have set a good example of excellent customer service! You should be promoted!  However, we noticed more than one time Tom from WAITUI House treats people differently based on their race. He smiles and behaves professionally to white people but treat other races in a rude manner and becomes impatient! A suggestion- hope it helps your business, as  there are more and more Asian tourists to your resort, it could be beneficial for more Chinese films and television programs, and food.

reviews.title: dream holiday
reviews.positives: nature

reviews.title: Very nice resort
reviews.text: Surrounding area is beautiful
reviews.room_type: Plunge Pool, Larger Guest room, 1 King, Island view, Adults Only

reviews.title: Absolutely amazing experience’
reviews.text:
We stayed at Sheraton Tokoriki for three nights and absolutely loved it. The villas were spotless, the pool was beautiful, and the buffet offered an impressive variety. There are two restaurants, and you can also order simple meals from the bar.
The views are stunning, with crystal-clear water that’s perfect for all kinds of water sports. There are also complimentary indoor activities such as weaving sessions, pool volleyball, and coconut dessert making, which were a lovely touch.
The staff were incredibly friendly, welcoming, and always happy to help. We truly enjoyed every moment of our stay.

The only improvement I can think of would be a Fiji cultural dance performed in traditional Fijian costumes — that would have made the experience even more special.

The kava ceremony was very special too, although I don’t think I’ll be tasting it again 😅

reviews.title: Staff treat guests like family
reviews.text: Fantastic island with staff that genuinely enjoy and care for this island. Lighting the Christmas tree ceremony with staff singing carols and prayers. Fantastic food, landscape and pool/beach. A real experience

reviews.title: Tokoriki Island stay
reviews.text:
Recommended:
- fantastic reef, snorkel directly off the beach 
- book accomodation with Breakfast at the Sheraton
- eat dinner every night if possible at the adjacent Tokoriki Island resort restaurant (it’s like a Michelin star restaurant compared to Sheraton)

reviews.title: Pleasant stay
reviews.text: We had an amazing time. The staff are super friendly.
reviews.room_type: Plunge Pool, Larger Guest room, 1 King, Island view, Adults Only

reviews.title: Vinaka Sheraton
reviews.text: We had a fantastic time at Sheraton Tokoriki resort. All of the staff are very friendly, attentive and welcoming throughout our stay . Exceptional customer service and we had a great time interacting with staff with their activities! Looking forward to visiting again in the future. Definitely recommend!

reviews.title: Christmas week
reviews.text: Hotel and staff is amazing! Would highly recommend.

reviews.title: Christmas week
reviews.text: Such a beautiful place to spend the holidays in! Even though the weather wasn’t the best (Christmas week had heavy rainfall and strong wind warning), the staff made the stay worthwhile.  We stayed in the island breeze room and it was very spacious, especially for our ten months old daughter, had a lot of crawling room space. Nanny service was amazing too! Highly recommend for families though please keep in mind that the transfer from the big boat to the small one can get quite choppy and dangerous if the weather isn’t on your side.

reviews.title: Paradise
reviews.text: We stayed at Tokoriki for our honeymoon and will treasure our stay forever. The staff were so welcoming and ensured that our time there would be one to remember! Nothing was too much trouble. Beautiful people, beautiful island. We absolutely love Tokoriki!
reviews.room_type: Plunge Pool, Larger Guest room, 1 King, Island view, Adults Only

reviews.title: A great place for relaxing and enjoying resort life.
reviews.positives: The location was amazing.  Loved having our own plunge pool and access to the beach and reef.  The Fijian massage was incredible and the pool and restaurant were good.  Mini golf was fun.
reviews.negatives: The outer limits of the property were unkept.  The beach directly in front of the main building and pool were kept clean but the beach in front of the burres had lots of seaweed and the access to beach from the burre was challenging

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Nice resort, fully equipped and beautiful scenery. Hope visit next time!

reviews.title: Beautiful Country, beautiful people. A very disappointing Marriott experience.
reviews.positives: For the cost and the fact the property is a Marriott owned property I expected a better organized resort. There was no local entertainment to be able to see Fijian ways. The service is exceptionally slow, although that is island life I believe. The choice of dining options are very poor and although we paid a lot of money and had the all inclusive Option, this did not include Late or Cappuccino or drinks & food after 9pm. The Indian restaurant was a bonus and once again not much choice but very good. The people are so nice you can’t complain about anything as it makes you feel bad. The pool was disgusting and I know  Many guests complained about that but we love the beach so it didn’t bother us too much. The islands get a ton of seaweed washed up on land and in the shallows so it’s not great for everyone. The reef, which is a fair swim out, is amazing and so are the views. We were in bed for 10pm every night as the bars close at 9pm, so it’s not for anyone wanting to party. Still love Fiji islands buts it’s so very expensive we doubt we will visit this resort again.
reviews.negatives: Poor choice of menu and no local entertainment

reviews.title: Loved it
reviews.text: Gorgeous location,  my young son and I holidayed here the staff were absolutely fantastic. The rooms are high standard and the facilities are great- highly recommend it

reviews.title: Good resort but beach was not as pictured
reviews.positives: Cleanliness, staff and most of the food. Snorkeling is also good at the dropoff in front of the hotel
reviews.negatives: Beach is not like in the photos. Full of algae and smelly as a result

reviews.title: Perfect can't wait to come back
reviews.text: Amazing experience staff and location was amazing lunch and dinner was magnificent however breakfast does need a little work. Location was perfect and the rooms were amazing. We can't wait to come back.

reviews.title: Great location, value for money, not so comfy beds
reviews.positives: The beach was incredible, and the value for money for all inclusive was fantastic. Great menu, great drinks. Having a la carte options as an alternative to the buffet was a nice touch. Really great value.
reviews.negatives:
Some of the staff are very slow in the restaurant. It could be really difficult to flag down a server. There were a couple of incredible servers in the restaurant, once we knew who they were it was a much smoother experience. 

The bed was really uncomfortable, two springy uncomfortable singles pulled together.

reviews.title: Super séjour de 3 jours
reviews.text: J'ai été surclassé dans une magnifique chambre stylé british, magnifique.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Staff were amazing

reviews.title: Parfait pour un séjour en famille
reviews.text: Ile magnifique perdue en pleine mer, un bleu incomparable, une ambiance de détente très agréable et de très bons restaurants. Les chambres sont spacieuses, pas de coût supplémentaire pour les lits supplémentaires et un personnel sympathique.

reviews.title: Beautiful place with friendly staff
reviews.positives: Very friendly staff who were happy to help with every request. The rooms were beautiful and private, we loved the plunge pool and view of the beach.
reviews.negatives: My husband got sick with a tummy bug while we were there, and in speaking to other guests we noted that a lot of people were getting sick. Hard to say if there was just something going around or if it was the water or food related.

reviews.title: Great Resort, amazing reef & People
reviews.text:
We had a great time!
Pool was great, food was good, snorkeling was amazing! 
Rooms were spacious and stylish!

Besides the hotel and reef the island is not very interesting. But that doesn't matter because the resort is perfect to relax.

The staff is super friendly and happy while working. Honestly inspiring!

Some fun activities for kids and adults! 

Prices are slightly expensive but worth it. 

Vinaka to the whole team!
Would definitely come back!!

reviews.title: Loved our stay. Likely won’t return.
reviews.positives:
The island is a lovely remote escape from the world! It’s quiet and peaceful. We were in Fiji to snorkel and we were not disappointed! We absolutely loved the reef drop off that is right out from the hotel. Some of the best snorkeling we had the entire vacation! The 2 snorkel day trips offered were very nice. Once it was just our family of 3. The second one was only 5 of us. 
This is not the hotel for frail/elderly- you are required to jump out of a boat onto the beach because there is no pier. (Or you may pay $$$ to arrive via helicopter). This is not the hotel for party seekers- which we appreciated!
The breakfast buffet was large and delicious!
reviews.negatives:
Very frustrating to work with reservations prior to arrival. We booked a room that accommodated 3 adults - our 15 yr old is considered an adult here. Our cost included the 3rd person. Just one week before, we were hit with a substantial fee from the hotel for the 3rd person. On TOP of that- there is absolutely NO place for a 3rd person to sleep! No couch/sofa or bedding! You MUST pay even more for your 3rd person to sleep. On TOP of that you are required to pay VAT tax and a 3% credit card fee. You are not allowed to pay in advance, so you must travel with thousands of dollars in cash to avoid additional fees.
It was 60% more than our originally booking fee by the time all the expenses were added for our 3rd person and fees. They did finally agree not to charge us one of the fees, but only after hours of phone calls and strongly worded emails. 
One side of the hotel is older, smaller and run down. The other half is much nicer and much more expensive. 
There were FLIES all over the food and bar area. No obvious attempt to get rid of them or cover the food/drinks/utensils. Other than the breakfast buffet, the options for food was very limited, the restaurants at the hotel are your only options to eat at. We didn’t like a single thing we ordered. Ended up eating protein bars and snacks we brought instead of buying expensive gross food at the restaurants for dinner.

reviews.title: のんびりしている
reviews.text: リノベーションしたばかりなので施設は綺麗です。部屋は予想していたよりも狭いですが、寝るだけに使い、昼間はプールやビーチ（カバナを作ってくれます）でのんびりし、夕方からハッピーアワーでワインを飲んで、ディナーへ向かうという感じで過ごしました。レストランレが一か所しかなく高めの料金設定です。部屋以外はとても満足がいくリゾートだと思いました。
reviews.positives: 施設に対して宿泊客が少ないので贅沢にスペースを使える。スタッフのホスピタリティが高い。海がきれい。

reviews.title: NA
reviews.positives:
staff Lai is very helpful and friendly! help us solve the problem effectively! 
reception also very friendly
reviews.negatives: food at main restaurant do need to get improvement as it is below the standard

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: No service, bad environment, bad facility, bad food, over charge. Recommend to check your bill when you check out.

reviews.title: 写了含税价，到扣款改口不含税
reviews.text: 预定的时候，显示含税价，比Booking上的不含税价要贵20%多，结果扣款加了我百分之二十几的税，还改口说就是不含税的，大家预定的时候千万看清，这里即使写着含税价格，到最后他们还是会收你税收，大家在这里预定请慎重！

reviews.title: 性价比低
reviews.text: 没有什么活动安排，岛上实物很贵，也很难吃，胜在岛很漂亮沙滩干净.不欢迎孩子的房子没有明确标名！对于客人的要求，忽视！

reviews.title: 五星管理
reviews.text: 上午九点十五分和下午三点，两个船班，一小时到岛了。相比其他外岛，酒店设施完善。沙滩浮潜时间是上午九点后，下午两点涨潮就不适合浮潜了。酒店餐单不多，但分量够（对东方人而言）。

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: 水上活动不错，餐食选择较少

reviews.title: 风比较大
reviews.text: 风很大 所以限制很多出岛活动 好几天都待在房间不能下水

reviews.title: 美丽的岛屿，完美的假期
reviews.text:
我和我的妻子在这里度过了难忘的4天3晚。这里简直就是天堂，从热情周到、训练有素的服务员，到舒适的连体别墅房间。我在此尽可能详细评论希望能帮到有意向预定的各位。
关于房间，我选择了普通海景房，应该有2个价格的海景房可供选择，并且都配有露天阳台和私人泳池（很小的泳池），区别在于贵的那类在第一排，看海视野相对普通的那类视野更开阔，如果你只准备懒散的呆在房间或阳台里，那别犹豫选择贵的吧。
关于水上娱乐，我们预定了165FJD/3天的家庭水上运动套餐，无限制使用非机动水上项目，非常超值。如果不预定套餐，所有的水上运动都是按小时收费的，我只记得浮潜三宝是15FJD/小时。
关于其他娱乐，每天泳池边的服务中心都会告示出当日的活动安排，项目丰富，可以重点关注，都很有意思。酒店后有几座小山丘，可以爬上去看日出日落。
关于餐饮，是我唯一不能给好评的地方。早餐近50FJD一位，晚餐98-112FJD一位，并且菜品并不多，并且额外点饮料还需要额外收费，一天下来2人光吃饭近1500rmb。建议自己在主岛带满食物过来。房间里水和牛奶免费，喝完了可以继续叫，没有限制。酒吧里有happy hours，在happy hours时间段部分饮品打折。
关于交通，我们乘坐south cruiser船，从Danarau码头出发，到托阔里奇岛边上会有几艘小船过来接驳到各自酒店。south cruiser在国内各大旅游平台都有预定。

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: very good
reviews.room_type: Plunge Pool, Larger Guest room, 1 King, Island view, Adults Only

reviews.title: 非常不错，很适合度蜜月
reviews.text: 入住即进入世外桃源，每天睁开眼，都是美丽的风景，这个时候你一定不后悔IPhone为何要买256G😃😃😃

reviews.title: 在单独的小岛上 非常私密 安静 海水好 热情
reviews.text: 中国人不太适合这里 吃的种类很少 餐厅很少

reviews.title: Relaxing oasis
reviews.text: Great stay, thoroughly relaxed and de-stressed, everything you would expect in a Fiji resort. Good mix of families, couples and solo travellers. Staff were friendly but not intrusive. Food options were not great (but still okay if you are only staying a few days) so something to consider if planning an extended stay.

reviews.title: Absolutely as expected.  1
reviews.positives: Staff are amazing.
reviews.negatives:
Second time there.  Missing and broken tiles in the pool.
Looking a bit tired overall.

reviews.title: Great honeymoon spot, if you get a room witb a private plunge pool.
reviews.positives: Location is unbeatable. The food at lunch/dinner was surprisingly good, especially considering you’re in a remote island
reviews.negatives:
LOTS of kids, and don’t have an adults-only pool.
Breakfast buffet was sub-par.

reviews.title: Lovely holiday with great snorkeling
reviews.positives:
Everything was beautiful. It was a nice 
intimate property. Great reef easily accessible from the beach. The staff was very helpful and friendly, especially Leila from kids club and Paula the pool bartender! The selection at breakfast was wonderful and generous, loved that there was a 4 hr window to eat if you wanted to sleep in.
reviews.negatives: Wish they had more than one pool. The pool got cloudy on our last couple of days which was not ideal.

reviews.title: Beautiful boutique hotel on a remote island
reviews.positives: The setting is stunning!
reviews.negatives: Beautiful boutique hotel with the most incredible staff.  The breakfast buffet is really good!

reviews.title: Overall it is an amazing experience.
reviews.positives: The resort is quite new. It is clean
reviews.negatives: The neighbor next door has kids. I can hear the kid start to screaming and running around from 6am. If you want to enjoy the quiet time, you may think abt the adult only resort.

reviews.title: Great resort, but disappointing beach
reviews.positives: The all inclusive package is really worth the money. The food and drinks were amazing! The staff was really friendly and professional! The pool was very nice! Overall, I’d recommend the resort!
reviews.negatives: The beach was not as beautiful as you’d expect from Fiji. Lots of sea plants that got stuck in the beach… so the sea would look a bit black for parts of the day! That’s obviously not something the hotel can do anything about… it’s more of a personal opinion of the location (beach-wise), considering I travelled to Fiji expecting those turquoise/ pristine waters everywhere (and that wasn’t the case unfortunately).

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Staff and free beach cabanas!

reviews.title: Dream vacation
reviews.positives: The beach was beautiful and there was a view of the ocean just about everywhere on the property
reviews.negatives: The gym was under renovation

reviews.title: Awesome
reviews.positives: Food was good, could do with more choices on pool side menu. Staff are wonderful.
reviews.negatives: Having an All Inclusive package, the resort kept running out on spirits included in this package which was a bummer when you pay big $$$. Thanks to Kingkon came to our rescue for this.

reviews.title: Good resort, beautiful reef.
reviews.positives: The resort is located only 1.30 hr from the main port at Nadi. The house reef is amazing, very vibrant and diverse corals. The gardens of the resort were stunning and The staff were amazing !
reviews.negatives: The resort is very isolated you can’t walk around the island from there. Also we went in April and is was raining season, therefore the rooms were smelling mouldy and the bedsheets were feeling wet. The rooms weren’t very clean, the carpet was very old and dirty. The curtains the same. Overall the facilities need some maintenance.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Room was good, with small irritations like a lack of awning over the sit out which prevents it from being used when it rains. Staff was friendly,.pool was nice.
reviews.negatives: Beach had lots of seaweed, which the staff clears but there enough to make the beach un usable on some days. The seaweed also makes it unpleasant to swim. The house reef it quite far out and it does take some effort to reach it by swimming. Unlike many other resorts the Sheraton does not offer free snorkelling trips or even snorkeling gear. Food was just about ok.

reviews.title: Beautiful restful holiday in a stunning location.
reviews.positives: This resort has a good balance of families and older couples. The pool is lovely with plenty of sun loungers plus covered seating. John our bar man was excellent and Iva in the restaurant took amazing care of us. You can snorkel to the edge of the reef straight from the beach which is brilliant . The activity centre team at the water sports centre we excellent also.

reviews.title: We found a few nights was a perfect stay as it is a small island. If you are looking to do nothing but just relax, or re
reviews.positives:
The staff were beyond fantastic! The scenery was surreal! We didn’t stay long enough to get snorkelling in but heard it was the best from others who went. 
Meals were wonderful.
reviews.negatives: The AC in the room was just a bit too cold for us. Struggled with getting the temp to go from 16C to 19C but it didn’t seem to adjust.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Beautiful island and location

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The staff were fantastic making sure our stay was just perfect. Our ocean front room was amazing with views over the beach and distant islands and very private.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Staff were amazing!!
reviews.positives: Beautiful
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Amazing stay! Loved it and will be back.
reviews.positives:
The staff were extremely friendly and helpful.  
The property is beautiful, well kept, and clean.
The food and drinks were delicious.
The 3 hour snorkelling tour was amazing.....the fish and coral were beautiful.
Taking a ride from the jet ski out to the drop off is free and definitely worthwhile.
reviews.negatives: I accidentally left an international charger and cord there and was unable to get it back.

reviews.title: A truly special place! We’ll keep coming back again and again. Thank you!
reviews.positives:
To begin with, the hospitality was outstanding: the people, smiles, music, and dances created a truly welcoming atmosphere. The staff, both Fijian and international, showed incredible care and kindness. We also appreciated how quickly our room issue at check-in was resolved.

The location was another highlight: a beautiful, isolated island with stunning nature, clear turquoise water, coral reefs, and a lovely sandy beach. Dinner was exceptional, with delicious steaks, lamb, and vegetarian options, while breakfast offered a solid buffet with freshly cooked eggs.
reviews.negatives:
Lunch was a bit disappointing, although the menu was extensive, most of the main dishes didn’t suit our taste, with only a few standing out.

The biggest issue was the bathroom smell! There was a strong sewage odor, which was quite unpleasant despite the room being otherwise clean.

reviews.title: Absolutely magical and we will come again in the future.
reviews.positives: That the resort has the feel of true Fiji.  Pristine beaches, exceptional customer service.  A very welcoming feel.
reviews.negatives: The pools including our private pool need additional safety rails to get in and out of the pools.  The tile is slippery and the steps are too far apart.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The pool, bar and dinning areas are all overlooking the ocean. Staff are wonderful.
reviews.negatives: They could do a better job of communicating activities available through the resort.

reviews.title: A perfect mix of relaxation and fun in paradise — we would happily return.
reviews.positives:
We had a wonderful stay at the Sheraton Resort & Spa, Tokoriki Island. The island itself is small and incredibly beautiful, with stunning views in every direction.

The snorkeling right from the shore was amazing — colorful corals, plenty of tropical fish, and even stingrays and reef sharks. The sandy beach is lovely, and there are plenty of activities to book if you want more adventure.

The staff were genuinely friendly and welcoming, the restaurants were great, and we enjoyed having tennis, table tennis, a pool table,  and a beautiful pool to relax by.
reviews.negatives: Some furnishings and outdoor areas could benefit from a refresh, but for this price point, the overall experience feels fair and well aligned with expectations.

reviews.title: Magical
reviews.positives: This was a special vacation where I proposed to my now-fiance. The staff were super friendly, both beforehand while I was setting things up via email (a special private dinner on the Helipad), and during. There was a small issue with our initial room but they more than made up for it with free upgrades and other benefits. The views are stunning and there's lots to do whether you want to stay in the resort full-time or go out on day-trips to other islands etc.
reviews.negatives: Perhaps more variety in terms of food would have been nice, but not a big issue for us.

reviews.title: Gorgeous snorkeling, amazing staff, beautiful grounds, incredible spa
reviews.positives: Everything about this resort was great!! We absolutely loved our stay. The staff is so kind and helpful, the grounds are beautiful, and our room was perfect. We did the plunge pool room on the adults only side and it was beautiful and had tons of space. The restaurants were delicious and the pool was beautiful. We did an orange blossom couples retreat at the spa and it was worth every penny. I was able to email the hotel and they helped us arrange our spa appointment and our ferry to and from the resort on South Sea Cruises. We did the all inclusive option which included 3 meals, all drinks including alcohol, and non motorized watersports. It was worth the price, we saved money and didn’t have to worry about how much we were spending day to day. The snorkeling was INCREDIBLE!!!! They will take you out on a jet ski or you can swim out. We saw tons of fish and coral. We brought our own snorkels and masks. This is a dream place for sea life lovers. We did the hike to hideaway beach. It was easy but not super well maintained, had lots of bugs, and we weren’t super impressed with the beach. The hike to the cell tower was too overgrown for our liking so we didn’t venture that was. We loved the exclusivity of the island. Overall we had an amazing time. The staff and the snorkeling make our trip incredible!!
reviews.negatives: There are only two ferries per day to and from the island so make sure you think about that in relation to your flights. The cost to do a private boat or helicopter transfer is much more. The latest ferry is at noon from port Denarau to the island and our flight arrived at 5pm so we had to stay at the port and take the 8:30am ferry the next morning.

reviews.title: It was a great hotel. The staff was amazing. We were upgraded to a very nice room without asking.
reviews.positives: Very Friendly staff
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Really excellent.  The Fijias is what made our stay especially enjoyable.
reviews.positives:
The breakfast buffet was wonderful.  The dinners could have had more vegetables on the side of the main course as sometimes the entre' wasn't filling enough.
Appreciated being towed out to the reef for snorkeling.  Water was plenteous.  Room and bed were quite comfortable.
reviews.negatives:
No pickleball court.  Lines could be put inside the tennis court and a different net added for game options.
Our room card didn't let us in the workout room.  We were not feeling well so we didn't pursue it.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Exceptional rooms and pool area was great.  Staff was very helpful and friendly.  Snorkeling the reef was some of the best we've seen from the shore of a resort.
reviews.negatives: Food was a little overpriced for the portions.  There is no other option other than the other resort on the island that has an even more expensive menu.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Everything about our stay at Sheraton Tokoriki Island Resort & Spa was exceptional. The journey itself was a highlight, with a scenic cruise and smooth boat transfer to the island, and the location is absolutely stunning.
The service was outstanding from start to finish. Even as locals, we were treated no differently and received the same high level of care and hospitality as every guest. The management team and staff were professional, warm, and genuinely welcoming.
The resort is very kid-friendly, making it ideal for families while still offering a relaxing and peaceful atmosphere.
Our stay was extra special as it was my birthday. The team surprised me with a beautiful, energetic birthday song, a thoughtful birthday card and message on the bed, and a delicious birthday cake prepared by the talented pastry chef, which we truly appreciated.
The farewell ceremony was incredibly touching and left a lasting impression on us.
Overall, a memorable and heartfelt experience. We would highly recommend Sheraton Tokoriki Island to anyone looking for a special island getaway in Fiji 🌴
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: dinner, beach, reef snorkelling, games room, very friendly staff, pool, very comfortable room

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The staff is just the greatest bunch of people on earth. My room had an amazing view, and I could walk down to the beach directly. Basically, perfection!
reviews.negatives: I did have a small problem with one of the pillows having a little dirt on it and a towel having an old spot- but I am a clean freak and I can find micro things like this. I didn't ask the reception or housekeeping to do anything about it (which I'm sure they happily would) so that's on me!

reviews.title: Loved it
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: First class resort with 5 star food and impeccable service!
reviews.positives: Property is beautiful. Staff was absolutely wonderful, attentive, friendly, and helpful. The food was amazing. Sits on a reef. Definitely do the all inclusive.
reviews.negatives: They allow people to hold chairs and cabanas all day when they’re not even there. They should change this policy. Countless times people would hold cabanas and not even show up for 4-5 hours and it happened at the pool also. There would be 25 chairs held and 10 people at the pool. Just don’t let people do that. It’s inconsiderate to people wanting to use them.

reviews.title: Awesome and memorable.
reviews.positives: The food was exceptional.  We were spoiled by the quality and variety.  Perhaps the best food we've ever been blessed with.
reviews.negatives: Unfortunately our weather was rainy on two of the four days we were there, but there's nothing that can be done about that. Everything else was great.

reviews.title: Lovely paradise vacation
reviews.positives: Friendly staff, choices on places to eat, very quiet
reviews.negatives: They need to get more pool chairs. Folks would come first thing in the morning and “ reserve” with towels several chairs, and then not show up for hours. At least have chairs for all of your guests!

reviews.title: We will be back got the ocean front next time
reviews.positives:
Clean comfy and great air conditioning! I learned that ocean view is way different than ocean front! Our room was maybe a one minute way to the pools, bar, and food.
The ocean was immaculate!
Perfect temperature! But a little salty!😜
reviews.negatives: Ocean view means maybe a sliver of the ocean 😩

reviews.title: Nice people, staff definitely needs a bit of retraining
reviews.positives: Property was in good shape, also beautiful. Rooms were nice. Beach was well maintained. The reef outside was one of the best I have ever seen. Food was also decent.
reviews.negatives:
It does seem like the staff could use some retraining. Everyone was incredibly nice and friendly, but there were lots of little mistakes. For example:
- Laundry taking much longer than expected and clothing not coming back very clean. It almost felt like they just dried the clothing instead of washing and drying.
- constant issues with food. Adding bacon into dishes that do not have bacon listed on the menu. Ordering drinks and not actually receiving them. Running out of items for a dish and not informing us - just serving the dish without protein.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Lovely beach front villa plunge pool with gorgeous views. Friendly staff and great food. Would recommend.
reviews.negatives: Food was expensive.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Staff, Fijian people are genuinely friendly, happy and thoughtful. 
Ocean villa with plunge pool, great facilities and location. 
Food was delicious. Good choices for food and drinks.
reviews.negatives: Snorkelling, having to go out to the ocean side of the reef to see fishes, in the same waters as ferry boats and jet skis - be a good idea for safety to mark off an area with bouys as off limits to powered vessels.

reviews.title: We had a great time and it was a beautiful experience getting to know the staff and visitors.
reviews.positives: The staff were really welcoming and nice throughout our entire stay. Beautiful resort and food was great!
reviews.negatives: Nothing we can think of.

reviews.title: A beautiful island resort with stunning views, friendly staff, and great snorkelling.
reviews.positives:
Stunning location with beautiful views of the ocean and island
Friendly and welcoming staff, special thanks to Irene, the recreation and Kai Wai team, and the chef
Delicious food, with a great option to try the Indian restaurant Curcuma
Daily housekeeping, clean and comfortable room
Excellent snorkelling right off the beach and at the reef crest
Relaxing pool with bar service
reviews.negatives:
Service in the restaurants was quite slow, sometimes waiting up to an hour for lunch
The all-inclusive package was confusing at first and took a couple of days to figure out
Room could use some light renovation

reviews.title: Wonderful birthday trip to Tokoriki
reviews.positives: The location is fantastic, wonderful views from the Ocean Front room and a few steps to access the beach. Amazing snorkelling a short swim or jetski ride off the beach. The food was excellent, I had seen some reviews that were critical of the food but that was not our experience at all, both restaurants had a lot of great options for all meals. The staff were friendly and helpful, the pool area is spacious and well laid out.
reviews.negatives: The room was in a quiet area, but in the room the fridge and the aircon were both quite noisy, which made sleeping difficult.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great and friendly staff and beautiful reef
reviews.negatives: Would be good to have more food options

reviews.title: We have been recomending this island to every person that has asked us how our trip was!
reviews.positives: From the friendliness of the staff, quality of food and service, and beauty of the property, absolutely incredible stay.
reviews.negatives: Ability to snorkel around the property is more limited compared to other islands.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Location is great and amazing beach but the food could be better
reviews.negatives: food

reviews.title: Clean hotel, excellent amenities and friendly staff
reviews.positives: Excellent service - really friendly staff. Clean with great amenities. Pool was amazing and the beach was great. Had a list of daily activities that guests could take part in!
reviews.negatives: More sunbeds should be available at the beach!

reviews.title: "A beautiful, relaxing getaway with amazing beaches, great service, and unforgettable memories."
reviews.positives: "Breakfast was fresh and had a good variety, with tropical fruits and cooked options. Dinner was delicious, especially the seafood, though a little expensive. The beach was stunning — clean, peaceful, and perfect for swimming and snorkelling."
reviews.negatives: "The food and drinks were quite expensive, and at times service at the restaurant was a little slow. But overall, these were minor compared to the amazing experience."

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Our 25th anniversary. When we first came to Tokoriki in 2000, the Sheraton was not here. The price difference was too much not to stay at the Sheraton. The staff is incredible!

reviews.title: The Tokoriki Sheraton is 100% perfection
reviews.positives: The location is amazing and the staff are incredibly kind, especially Leila and Ive who were both so warm and friendly throughout our entire 8-day stay. Anna also took great care of us and kept our room spotless and replenished with everything we needed. The kitchen staff did their very best to accommodate my wheat allergy. We found the food at Waitui our favorite and had lunch or dinner there practically every day. Super fresh and healthy options, the poke and the salad nicoise were my favorites and my husband loved the wrap. The bar was also great for an afternoon cocktail and the best french fries on the planet. The grounds are old school elegance. Nothing's too tweaked, trimmed or overly designed, rather just simply beautiful. Ditto the spa and the services are excellent, especially the 'Bamboo' massage. Mariah has hands of gold!
reviews.negatives: We loved every bit of our stay.

reviews.title: Beautiful paradise island
reviews.positives: Amazing beach and hotel facilities.
reviews.negatives: Planning to get there requires a ferry or speedboat (costly option).

reviews.title: PARADISE
reviews.positives: EVERYTHING AMAZING
reviews.negatives: I didn’t stay long enough

reviews.title: Immaculate views, kindest and friendliest staff, clean, relaxing.. we are so happy that we chose to stay here!
reviews.positives: Beautiful & relaxing. The staff is so kind, we felt like family. Great value.
reviews.negatives: Liked everything

reviews.title: Very relaxing, everything is on Island-time, beautiful place and people. So be prepared to slow down
reviews.positives: Staff were amazing. Breakfast was a great selection everyday. Alcohol was mid shelf not rot-gut for the all-inclusive.
reviews.negatives: The bed was 2 mattresses pushed together and firmness not good. Wife and I have sore lower backs every morning. The all-inclusive is too expensive for what is provided. The lunches and dinners were very repetitive with a rotation of similar food recipes. Seemed to be understaffed as always waiting for someone at the bar, or hostess station, etc. Also, no wine or beer provided in the rooms. Sandals is less money and provides much more food variety, pools activities and personal service for the lower price. The physical place and staff saved the day however, both being very nice. I would recommend pay as you go and not all-inclusive. Single large pool while we were there was loaded with kids out of control splashing us even at the swim-up bar, no parental control so we were forced to stay in our private sitting pool with our room.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The staff was amazing, food was great , atmosphere and location was great. Facility needs some repairs. Tv never worked. Low water pressure and need to clean hidden beach.
reviews.negatives: Needs some repairs

reviews.title: Beautiful start to our honeymoon!
reviews.positives: Unbelievably beautiful location; it looks like you’re arriving into a dream. The swim-up bar was particularly fun, and we appreciated the complimentary bottle of bubbly kindly waiting in our room!

reviews.title: We loved every second we spent here and were really sad to leave! Great food, people and the most  beautiful beach we ha
reviews.positives: Beautiful resort surrounded by crystal clear water! We loved every minute we spent here. The staff was exceptional, food was great and we enjoyed all the activities! The staff even prepared a sweet gender reveal for us! Thank you so much!
reviews.negatives: Good and drinks are a bit pricey but that is understandable due to the remote location of the island! Other than that everything was just perfect!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Food is not bad. Friendly staff. A customer laundry. Massage is super comfy.
